title: Ctx struct is pub(crate) but only used in evaluator.rs
description: evaluator.rs defines Ctx as pub(crate) with all fields also pub(crate). Nothing outside evaluator.rs constructs or reads a Ctx — all callers are within the same file. The overclaimed visibility means any future crate-internal module could construct a Ctx with arbitrary state (wrong regex_cache, mismatched variables_enabled, etc.) without going through eval_script. If it stays pub(crate) indefinitely, the next person adding a module will see a pub(crate) struct with no doc comment explaining why it is that way, and may use it. Fix: make Ctx and all its fields private (no pub annotation). Since Ctx is in evaluator.rs and used only there, this is a drop-in change.
